title: hieracium murorum subsp. ellipsophyllum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. ellipsophyllum, also known as a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin issues, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. ellipsophyllum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the digestive system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential side effects.
